scope: Communication call recording simultaneous first-start race lock.
expected: Two simultaneous first recording-start requests for the same active session must serialize so exactly one request starts LiveKit egress/recording and the other returns 409 call_recording_already_active, with one recording row and one recording_started event after readback.
actual: Pass after fix: recording start now takes a per-tenant/session advisory transaction lock before checking active recordings and starting egress. The final targeted cluster returned green: happy-path start, duplicate active start, and simultaneous first-start race all passed.

diagnosis.command: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/communicationRealtimeRoutes.db.test.ts -t "deduplicates simultaneous first recording starts"
diagnosis.observed: Pre-fix targeted test failed: statuses were [201, 201] instead of expected [201, 409].

verification.command: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/communicationRealtimeRoutes.db.test.ts -t "startRecording starts|rejects duplicate recording start|deduplicates simultaneous first recording starts"
verification.observed: 1 file passed; 3 selected tests passed, 23 skipped
verification.notes: Vitest emitted the existing duplicate assignment.delete warning in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts, unrelated to this slice.

verification.observed: Seeded dev tenants, users, org structure, CRM, projects and communications data
verification.notes: Restored local browser/dev seed state after the targeted DB tests.
Used direct local tsc because pnpm --filter typecheck was blocked before tsc by pnpm ignored-builds approval state.
Covers ApiTenantDataSource/PostgresTenantDataSource and recording workspace type wiring.

coverageImpact: Closes the specific media recording simultaneous first-start race atom with a backend advisory transaction lock and DB/API regression coverage. Broader RISK-WRITE-FLOW-RACE-IDEMPOTENCY remains open for other write surfaces.
